title: Cloud Storage Systems
summary: We study storage architecture, indexing, scheduling, and reliability mechanisms for large-scale cloud infrastructure.

title: Operating Systems Infrastructure
summary: We build system software that exposes predictable performance, isolation, and observability across modern datacenter platforms.

title: Infrastructure for AI
summary: We explore storage, tracing, and serving infrastructure for AI workloads, especially when scale and efficiency matter.

title: Reliability and Observability
summary: We design tools and methodologies for detecting, explaining, and mitigating failures in production systems.
